nodes.name: Chapin's apalis
nodes.summary: Chapin's apalis (Apalis chapini) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. The common name and the Latin binomial commemorate the American ornithologist James Chapin. References
nodes.shortSummary: Chapin's apalis (Apalis chapini) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Malawi, Tanzania, and Zambia.
